meta_title: For Students: content creation to Solve can't debug code (Beginner Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to content creation and overcome can't debug code. A Beginner-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Content Creation to Solve Debugging Roadblocks
content.seo_description: Learn how to use content creation to overcome debugging hurdles. A beginner-level case study using Antigravity and Claude Code to accelerate your coding.
content.answer_block: When you cannot debug your code, document the process as content. By explaining your logic to an audience, you force clarity upon your thoughts. Use Antigravity to structure your technical documentation and Claude Code to analyze your stack, effectively turning your debugging struggle into a valuable educational resource.
content.intro:
The screen is a blur of red error messages, and your coffee has gone cold. You have been staring at the same five lines of code for hours, feeling the familiar sting of imposter syndrome creeping in. Every developer has been here—stuck in the labyrinth of a bug that defies logic.

But what if the solution wasn't just fixing the code, but teaching it? By shifting your mindset from 'developer in distress' to 'content creator documenting a discovery,' you strip away the pressure. This case study shows you how to leverage AI tools to debug while simultaneously building a portfolio that proves your technical resilience.

steps.title: Define the Bug Narrative
steps.description: Identify the specific error and frame it as a learning milestone rather than a failure.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current error log and draft a concise, engaging 'Problem Statement' for a technical blog post that highlights the specific technical challenge.
steps.claude_code_command: claude read ./src/error_log.txt --task 'summarize the root cause of this error in 3 sentences'

steps.title: Automate Context Gathering
steps.description: Use AI to extract the relevant code snippets that are causing the friction.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Extract the core logic causing the bug and format it into a clean, educational code snippet with comments explaining the expected vs actual behavior.

steps.title: Generate Debugging Logic
steps.description: Use Claude Code to iterate on potential fixes while documenting the thought process.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a senior mentor. Explain three potential debugging strategies for this code block and rank them by ease of implementation for a beginner.
steps.claude_code_command: claude fix --file=app.py --explanation 'explain the fix for educational content'

steps.title: Synthesize the Solution
steps.description: Combine the error, the investigation, and the fix into a coherent piece of content.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a 'How I Fixed It' section for a case study. Emphasize the logic used to find the bug and the specific command-line tools used to verify the fix.

steps.title: Verify and Publish
steps.description: Run final tests to ensure the fix is stable before sharing your findings.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the final code fix for performance optimizations and suggest one 'Pro Tip' to include in the content piece for other students.

pro_tips: Always include the 'before' and 'after' code states to demonstrate visual progress.
Use AI to generate 'common pitfalls' sections to show you understand the wider context, not just the specific bug.
Treat your error logs as 'raw data' for your content—they are the blueprint of your learning journey.
Record a 30-second screen capture of the terminal output to add high-production value to your written content.
Focus on the 'why' behind the fix; explaining the architecture is more valuable than just showing the patched code.
content.next_steps: Once your first fix is documented, share it on GitHub Gists or Dev.to to build your professional footprint. Start your next project with the intent to document every major roadblock you encounter.
content.conversion_block: Don't let bugs stop your growth—turn them into your greatest portfolio assets. Join a community that values progress over perfection. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
